name: FhirR4BaseCompositeComponentCodeValue
title: FHIR R4 — composite parameter component-code-value-quantity returns non-5xx
description: Per FHIR R4 search.html#composite, composite parameters chain a code+value pair atomically (matches must occur in the SAME repetition). `component-code-value-quantity` on Observation is the canonical example: 'systolic BP component AND value > 140' must be the same component, not different ones. MAY-level — many servers don't implement composites. 5xx indicates a parser crash on the `$` separator.
